data.body: I have found success only in tricking my brain. I will find some small thing to do, or some minor task on the project I *have* to do, and tell myself that's all I have to do. 9 outta 10 times I'll accidentally lock in, but only bc I pretended I didn't have to. It's... frustrating, but it works!
